texto: If one would praise the Almighty, one must then revel in His works, and take them whole, adore their very grossness, savor the oozing quiddity of that slime of which He seems to be inordinately fond. Love is not nice. God's love assuredly is not; and human love, its copy, must not presume to be so.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eric Frank Russell sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “If one would praise the Almighty, one must then revel in His works, and take them whole, adore th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, god, interesting, útil em momentos de trabalho e interesting.

frase_original: If one would praise the Almighty, one must then revel in His works, and take them whole, adore their very grossness, savor the oozing quiddity of that slime of which He seems to be inordinately fond. Love is not nice. God's love assuredly is not; and human love, its copy, must not presume to be so.

texto: How can trade be bad if you don’t make moneyeven when it’s good?” inquired Gleed, reasonablyapplying the information Harrison had given him.Jeff’s big moon eyes went over him slowly thenturned to Harrison. “So he’s another bum off yourboat, eh? What’s he talking about?”“Money,” explained Harrison. “It’s stuff we use tosimplify trade. It’s printed stuff, like documentaryobs of various sizes.”“That tells me a lot,” Jeff Baines observed. “Ittells a crowd that has to make a printed record ofevery ob is not to be trusted — because they don’teven trust each other.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eric Frank Russell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “How can trade be bad if you don’t make moneyeven when it’s good?” inquired Gleed, reasonablyapply…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, trust, harrison pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

What’s he talking about?”“Money,” explained Harrison. “It’s stuff we use tosimplify trade. texto: Damn! - I'd rather walk into something of my own accord than to be frogmarched into it.""So it says here in the file. James Mowry, twenty-six, restless and pigheaded. Can be trusted to do anything at all - provided the alternative is worse.""You sound like my father. Did he tell you that?""The Service does not reveal its sources of information.
